**What should CheckGrow cover that it doesn't?**
Describe the gap you see.

**Proposed addition**
- [ ] New failure pattern (name + description)
- [ ] New skill
- [ ] New backend mapping (semantic-map.json)
- [ ] New example (real-world case)
- [ ] Documentation improvement
- [ ] Other: ___

**Why this matters**
How does this gap cause problems in practice?

**Example**
If you have a concrete example of the failure/pattern in action, share it here.
